articles.description: Smartphones are evolving beyond just hardware. Companies like Google and Apple are now prioritizing artificial intelligence. This means phones will understand users better and perform tasks automatically.
articles.content: For years, buying a smartphone was a numbers game. Battery size, charging speeds, processor performance, camera megapixels. The bigger the number, the better the phone. Brands built entire marketing … [+10621 chars]
